status_boundary: PASS_SOURCE_COVERAGE means the ledger preserves source-bound cosmohedron grouped-inequality, positive-delta, submodular-compatibility, and delta_full=0 interface claims. It is not a mathematical proof, not an SMT/Z3 proof, not a full submodular-law theorem, not substrate evidence, not engineering readiness, and not a physical settling-law result.

support_summary.allowed_inference: R12 may cite source-bound grouped inequality, positive delta, submodular-compatibility, and delta_full interface material
support_summary.blocked_inference: SMT proof, Z3 proof, all-domain submodular theorem, Formation Medium substrate evidence, physical settling law, or engineering readiness
support_summary.checked_interface: ledger/source coverage for cosmohedron grouped-inequality delta/submodular compatibility language
